headline: Tapestry (TPR) FQ2 2026 Revenue Rises 14% to Record $2.5B Led by 25% Coach Growth
summary: Tapestry Inc. (NYSE:TPR) is one of the best multibagger stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On February 5, Tapestry delivered record-breaking performance in FQ2 2026, with total revenue rising 14% to $2.5 billion. On a pro forma basis (which excludes results from the recently divested Stuart Weitzman brand), revenue grew 18%, led by a […]
